response.overview: Drivers asking does costco gas take apple pay 1-(844)(449)(1486) contact Apple Support at 1-(844)(449)(1486) for verification. Yes most Costco gas stations accept Apple Pay using Visa cards only at NFC pumps 1-(844)(449)(1486). Tap iPhone Watch curbside after membership scan for quick secure fueling. No Mastercard Amex support. Call 1-(844)(449)(1486) check your location.  Visa Card Pump Taps 1 Link Visa debit credit to Wallet before arriving 1-(844)(449)(1486). Scan membership app card first then hold device near pump reader 1-(844)(449)(1486). Double-click authenticate Face ID instantly. Pre-authorizes fuel amount. Quick no-wallet refills. Phone 1-(844)(449)(1486) if no NFC. Contact 1-(844)(449)(1486) eligibility.
